mapper.sql: A.UNITY_LINK_ID, A.UNITY_LINK_SE_CODE, A.UNITY_LINK_NM, A.UNITY_LINK_URL, A.UNITY_LINK_DC, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM

sql.if: AND (A.UNITY_LINK_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%') OR A.UNITY_LINK_DC LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_UNITY_LINK A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT FROM TB_UNITY_LINK A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_UNITY_LINK A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_UNITY_LINK A WHERE A.UNITY_LINK_ID = #{unityLinkId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_UNITY_LINK (UNITY_LINK_ID, UNITY_LINK_SE_CODE, UNITY_LINK_NM, UNITY_LINK_URL, UNITY_LINK_DC, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID) VALUES (#{unityLinkId}, #{unityLinkSeCode}, #{unityLinkNm}, #{unityLinkUrl}, #{unityLinkDc}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{frstRegisterId})
